title: Allan Quatermain
author: Henry Rider Haggard
description: * Book : Allan Quatermain* Biography* BibliographyThe character Allan Quatermain is the hero of H. Rider Haggard's 1885 novel King Solomon's Mines. In this adventure novel named after him, Quatermain longs for a return to the wilderness after losing his son. He talks a number of companions into joining him and they journey inland from Africa's east coast, where they are attacked by Masai warriors.
